data.title: Tesla Bear Craig Irwin Turns Bullish On EV Giant, Increases Price Target By 347%: 'There Are Abundant Positive Catalysts'
data.description: Roth MKM analyst Craig Irwin on Monday raised Tesla Inc's price target by a whopping 347% from $85 to $380 and upgraded the rating to a "buy" from "neutral."

data.title: Politics Halt Norwegian Deep-Sea Mining, Environmentalists Look Toward Japan
data.description: Norway stopped deep-sea mining due to political pressure and environmental concerns. Japan's aspirations and global regulations add to the debate.

data.title: Super Micro Shares Jump 7% In Premarket As Special Committee Clears It Of 'Misconduct' Allegations, But Top Investment Bank Flags 2 Key Aspects To Watch
data.description: Super Micro Computer announced the completion of an independent review on Monday. The review, conducted by an Independent Special Committee, found no "evidence of misconduct" by the company's management or board.

data.title: Why Credo Technology Group Shares Are Trading Higher By 40%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Asia And Europe Markets Gain; Oil Rises Ahead of OPEC+ Meeting - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: Economic data shows mixed U.S. market close, construction spending up, ISM manufacturing PMI surpasses expectations. Most S&P 500 sectors decline, Dow falls. Asian markets up.
